methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series G → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.25x) to $3.3B last post money.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in AI & Software. Range: $4.1B - $126.0B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in AI & Compute

data.narrative:
Together AI, founded by Vipul Prakash and Ce Zhang, is a Series G AI & Software company currently valued at $3.3B post-money following $534M in total capital raised. The peer universe consists of 9 comparables—1 public (Palantir) and 8 private—including frontier AI and applied AI infrastructure companies such as OpenAI, Anthropic, xAI, and Databricks.

Two triangulation methods are applicable. Stage-progression analysis applies a 1.25x multiplier typical of Series G advancement to the $3.3B last post-money valuation, implying $4.1B. Peer-median analysis across three same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables—Waymo ($126.0B), Applied Intuition ($15.0B), and Dataminr ($4.1B)—yields a median of $15.0B, though the wide range ($4.1B–$126.0B) reflects significant dispersion in stage and market position within the peer set.

Triangulation across both methods supports a valuation range of $3.5B to $17.2B, with a median implied value of $9.6B. The current $3.3B valuation sits near the low end of this range. Key uncertainties include the appropriate peer comparability given Together AI's specific positioning within the fragmented frontier AI stack, and the applicability of public-market multiples in a sector with limited liquid benchmarks. The wide peer dispersion suggests stage and product-market maturity remain material drivers of valuation spread.
